ai.response: I can help you explore Phiraphat's portfolio. Would you like to see technical stack details or specific AI-driven projects?

responses.greeting: Hey, glad you're here. Ask me about projects, skills, or contact details and I'll guide you fast.
responses.projects: Here are selected projects with AI, fintech, and infrastructure focus. I can scroll you to the projects section now.
responses.skills: Core stack: Angular, Node.js, TypeScript, and AI integration workflows. If you want, I can break down each skill by real project usage.
responses.contact: You can reach out from the contact section and we can discuss your project scope quickly. I can move you there now.
responses.default: I can help with projects, skills, and contact info in this portfolio. Try asking things like 'show projects' or 'what are your skills'.

hero.title: Nova Intelligence
hero.subtitle: Distributed Neural Network Orchestrator
hero.alt: Abstract 3D visualization of neural network pathways with violet and cyan pulses

overview.challengeBody: Modern LLMs require massive computational throughput that centralized architectures struggle to handle without latency. Nova Intelligence decentralizes inference to deliver sub-100ms response times across distributed global nodes while preserving integrity.
overview.solutionBody: We engineered a custom Rust orchestration layer that allocates workloads by node proximity and hardware health. A hybrid P2P-relay system creates a self-healing grid that scales horizontally without a single point of failure.

architecture.title: Rust
architecture.description: Used for the high-performance core orchestrator with memory safety and thread-level concurrency.

architecture.title: Next.js
architecture.description: The administrative dashboard uses Server Components for real-time telemetry streaming.

architecture.title: PyTorch
architecture.description: Distributed tensor shards optimized for heterogeneous GPU environments.

architecture.title: AWS
architecture.description: Multi-region edge deployment for the primary coordination gateway.

items.title: Real-time Data Synthesis
items.description: Engineered a low-level stream processor that aggregates fragmented neural signals into a coherent tensor stream with zero buffer bloat.

items.title: Low-latency Orchestration
items.description: Developed a load-balancing algorithm that predicts network congestion 500ms ahead using historical traffic patterns.

items.title: Zero-Trust Telemetry
items.description: Implemented end-to-end encrypted packet inspection to monitor node health without exposing model data.

items.title: Elastic Scalability
items.description: Supports instant node onboarding, expanding global compute capacity up to 200% during demand spikes.
